name: PAPILLARY FIBROELASTOMA
definition: FIBROELASTIC PAPILLOMA = PAPILLOMA / MYXOMA / FIBROMA OF VALVES = GIANT LAMBL MYXOFIBROMA = HYALINE FIBROMA rare benign excrescence predominantly affecting surface of cardiac valves

demographics.Prevalence: 25% of all cardiac valvular tumors (most common valvular tumor); 10% of all
demographics.Path: gelatinous mass with "sea anemone" appearance ← multiple delicate branching
demographics.Histo: avascular papilloma = avascular connective tissue composed of fibrous core + lined by
demographics.Size: usually < 1.0-1.5 cm in diameter (may be as large as 5 cm)

discriminating_features: CHARACTERISTIC stippled edge with a "shimmer / vibration" at interface between tumor

general: CHARACTERISTIC stippled edge with a "shimmer / vibration" at interface between tumor
MR: intermediate SI / hypointense compared to myocardium

clinical.Rx: surgical excision ± leaflet repair / valve replacement
